name: internal-ai-gateway
description: Internal AI gateway for routing engineer traffic to provider APIs.

scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && cargo check --manifest-path services/proxy/Cargo.toml && cargo check --manifest-path services/provider-mock/Cargo.toml
scripts.lint: biome check . && cargo fmt --manifest-path services/proxy/Cargo.toml --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path services/proxy/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --manifest-path services/provider-mock/Cargo.toml --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path services/provider-mock/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.test: find functions infra services shared -path '*/cdk.out/*' -prune -o -name '*.test.ts' -print | xargs node --test && cargo test --manifest-path services/proxy/Cargo.toml && cargo test --manifest-path services/provider-mock/Cargo.toml
